title: Targeted's Purple hotbar
description: it adds an purple hotbar select icon to your game
body:
💜 Purple Hotbar Selection Icon

This resource pack replaces Minecraft’s default hotbar selection outline with a custom purple-themed selection icon, giving your UI a cleaner, more modern, and visually pleasing look.

Designed to be easy on the eyes while still standing out clearly during gameplay, the purple selector adds a subtle pop of color without distracting from the rest of the HUD. It works seamlessly with both vanilla textures and most other resource packs, making it perfect for players who want a small but noticeable UI upgrade.

Whether you’re going for a minimalist aesthetic, a darker color palette, or just love purple, this pack enhances your hotbar without changing gameplay or performance. Simply install and enjoy a smoother, more stylish inventory experience.

Features:

Custom purple hotbar selection icon

Clean and minimal UI enhancement

No performance impact

Compatible with most resource packs

Perfect for players who appreciate simple visual tweaks that make Minecraft feel more personalized and polished💜
